calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Action Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs EDDIE RODRIGUEZ, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES' Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Action Claims Without Prejudice.

Plaintiff Eddie Rodriguez's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Action Claims Without Prejudice is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, Rodriguez's individual claims shall be dismissed with prejudice, whereas the representative PAGA claims shall be dismissed without prejudice. Plaintiff shall present an executed CIV-110(s), along with this order, to the Clerk.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
